text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 14 

PRIMARY_DISPENSER_TYPE 

LABEL: Pharmacy Primary Dispenser Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable describes the type of pharmacy that filled the prescription. NCPDP requires all providers 
to specify a primary dispenser type. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRIMARY_DISPENSER_TYPE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: 
01 = Community/retail pharmacy, defined as a pharmacy
